title: Verify login performance under load
description: Test that the POST /auth/login endpoint response time remains under 500ms at the 95th percentile during a load test.
preconditions: A load testing environment is set up
A pool of test user accounts is available

steps.description: 1. Configure a load testing tool (e.g., JMeter, k6) to simulate 1000 concurrent users
2. Create a test script that sends POST requests to the /auth/login endpoint with valid credentials
3. Run the load test for a sustained period (e.g., 5 minutes)
4. Analyze the results, specifically the 95th percentile response time for the login requests

expected_result: The 95th percentile response time for the /auth/login endpoint is less than 500ms, and the error rate is below an acceptable threshold (e.g., < 1%).
